programme.desc: A short film about how a group of elderly ladies is inspired but their friend to pursue their dreams even in their sunset years.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: While Watson and the team help a woman whose memory resets every three minutes, Watson struggles with auditory hallucinations and questions whether someone is behind his current decline. Also, Moriarty plots his next move.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 9
programme.desc: Yao Kang confesses to Guo Ying that the mafia is threatening him to betray the police. He reveals he accidentally killed a frontline staff while hunting down a wanted criminal, and pushed the blame onto the criminal in fear that his future may be affected. Little did he know that it was all recorded on a car's dashcam, and the mafia uses it to coerce him for information on the police force.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 10
programme.desc: Mary wants Zhi Ming to invite Guo Ying and Yu Xuan home for a meal. Yu Xuan uses this opportunity to ask Zhi Ming about his background and learns that he was a homeless orphan until Mary adopted him. Although Zhi Ming lost his memory, he remembers that he was kidnapped. Yu Xuan is astonished as she recalls a boy she had frequently played with getting kidnapped when she was a child.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 15
programme.desc: Ting Xuan confesses to Wei Ren. Wei Ren is troubled, and he tells Ji Dan Zai that he is still going through his divorce and does not think that he is ready to begin a new relationship. Ji Dan Zai realises that Wei Ren does not have feelings for Jia Ying, and he gets angry because he feels anguished that Jia Ying would fall for such a man. In contrast, he tries so hard to pursue Jia Ying, but Jia Ying always avoids him instead.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 16
programme.desc: At the En Bloc Signing event, there is an air of excitement. Xiao Long and Shu Juan try to agitate the residents and influence their decision. Wei Ren is angry, and he confronts Shu Juan. Yan Xun invites the property owner to sign the document, but all of a sudden a snake appears, causing a wave of panic. Yan Xun finds out that the snake is actually a toy snake, and that Xiao Long had planned this. He becomes angered by this.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 5
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 2
programme.desc: As measles cases resurface in Singapore, Frontline examines the causes, risks of infection, and how individuals can protect themselves. Rising rents and costs are straining hawkers and small F&B businesses, worsened by competition from large chains. Social media helps boost visibility, but what are needed to keeping the business thrive? Why is it challenging to preserve the hawker culture?

programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 3
programme.desc: Zayden is slapped by Limin for talking back to her. Furious, he leaves home and asks Qian to take him in. When Xuefeng comes knocking, he and Qian open up to each other over drinks. Qian apologises to Xuefeng. Together, they work hard to pacify Limin. A moved Limin finally relents, and the family reconciles. Qian retires and hands the mirror to Haoyu, the successor to a second-hand bookshop.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 9
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Kowloon My City - EP 3
programme.desc: More than a decade ago, Jialin left without saying goodbye, leaving Sanyuan and Kowloon City behind. Neighbours and locals lamented that this well-matched couple could not be together, sympathising with Sanyuan and feeling that Jialin had let him down.

programme.title: Focus - EP 2
programme.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is under strain, and the Red Sea is unsafe. As oil shipments are disrupted, food supply may be next. With Middle East conflict ongoing, tensions remain high. Donald Trump has also suggested Cuba as a potential next target. Meanwhile, Hong Kong’s old businesses are closing. Is it rent pressure, or deeper economic problems?

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1058
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

programme.title: We Never Stop - EP 6
programme.desc: The program brings together 100 Chinese physical fitness experts to compete in an undifferentiated physical fitness competition, and ultimately determines a champion to become the "strongest body" of the year.

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 87
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 13
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Ta Ya found "Yu Da" odd as he is behaving differently now. "Yu Da" and Ming Xi managed to arrange a meeting with Wang Le but the meeting got disrupted before they can find out anything.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 73
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) A-Feng hesitates before visiting the hospitalised Zhang Hao, who asks her to take care of the school. Meanwhile, Shizhen plans to leave everything behind to study overseas.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 74
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Willing to give up custody of Tianlan, Junhe also reveals his intention to depart for the US. He asks for a final moment with her, a request Taijing and Liandou accept as they agree to bring Tianlan to see him.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 4
programme.desc: Embracing Tu Jie’s spirit of getting lost on purpose, they embark on a spontaneous, unplanned adventure through Pingtung. Through cross-industry collaborations with celebrities, they explore the ocean and fishing village culture from fresh perspectives - from fishing trips at sea and crab hunting in hidden coastal spots to experiencing the highlight of the tuna season: the black tuna auction.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 10
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) The ghost of a king arrives at the hotel and is given royal treatment. However, Canxing is suspicious as nobody is entirely sure which king he was.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 153
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh - EP 607
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 101
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 153
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintaku Menyala Terus Gak Perlu Digas
programme.desc: A traumatic high school fire inspired Lista (Larasati Nugroho) to become a firefighter, all while secretly searching for the hero who saved her that day. During a rescue mission, Lista saves a young boy named Angga, who turns out to be the son of Gara (Ridho Illahi). When Gara reveals that he used to be a firefighter himself, Lista begins to wonder if she has finally found the person she’s been looking for.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh - EP 607
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU
programme.desc: To pursue her dream of becoming a singer, Pipit (Larasati Nugroho) always performs wearing a mask. Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 102
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 103
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 609
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Good Boy Bad Boy
programme.desc: Rajan, a bookworm has a somber nature. While Raju is a prankster and has no time for studies. Release Year: 2007 Director: Ashwini Chaudhary

programme.title: Do Lafzon Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Centered on ex-mixed martial arts artist Sooraj and sculptor artist Jenny. Their fate intertwines when their past are revealed in their relationship. Release Year: 2016 Director: Deepak Tijori

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Chandro and Prakashi, both past sixty, defy age limits as they master shooting, inspiring women across the nation to chase dreams and break social barriers. Release Year: 2019 Director: Tushar Hiranandani Awards: 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Bhumi Pednekar- Tied withTaapsee Pannu, 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Taapsee Pannu

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.title: Army
programme.desc: Army officer Arjun marries Geeta but is killed by gangster Naagraj. Geeta, pregnant and fueled by revenge, teams up with escaped convicts to fight Naagraj. Release Year: 1996 Director: Raam Shetty

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Tigers : Can A Salesman Be A Hero
programme.desc: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman, decides to stand against his company after discovering that their new baby formula is responsible for the death of many babies. Release Year: 2014 Director: Danis Tanovic Awards: 2014 Nominee Golden Seashell- Best Film- Danis Tanovic

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: Amid the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971, a RAW agent enters Pakistan to prove the country's complicity in nuclear weapons. To succeed, he must alert his nation and avoid an attack on the wrong location. Release Year: 2023 Director: Shantanu Bagchi Awards: 2023 Winner Technical Award Web- Best Screenplay - OTT- Aseem ArroraParveez SheikhSumit - Batheja,2023 Nominee Popular Award- Most Popular Actor in a Digital Film- Sidharth Malhotra

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

programme.desc: Army officer Arjun marries Geeta but is killed by gangster Naagraj. Geeta, pregnant and fueled by revenge, teams up with escaped convicts to fight Naagraj. Release Year: 1996 Director: Raam Shetty

Release Year: 2016 Director: Remo D'Souza Awards: 2017 Nominee Reader's Choice- Best Choreographer- Rahul ShettyPaul Cardoz

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Mahavatar Narsimha
programme.desc: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Kapil and Somya are a happily married couple who live in a joint family and decide to get a divorce. Things don't go as planned as their family gets to know of it, and thus begins a comedy of errors.

programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 37
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut - EP 1
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1792
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bien Bati - EP 3
programme.desc: Paquet House is supporting two families with their restoration adventures. elisa Gouin has inherited a family passion for her ancestral home. And a traditional builder passes on his know-how to his son.

programme.title: A Travers Champs - EP 2
programme.desc: Farming is a sector with many uncertainties. Special insurance policies exist and tools have been introduced to help farm producers in hard times. Are they sufficient?

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: A Travers Champs - EP 2
programme.desc: Farming is a sector with many uncertainties. Special insurance policies exist and tools have been introduced to help farm producers in hard times. Are they sufficient?

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Bien Bati - EP 3
programme.desc: Paquet House is supporting two families with their restoration adventures. elisa Gouin has inherited a family passion for her ancestral home. And a traditional builder passes on his know-how to his son.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut - EP 1
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 14
programme.desc: A princess was so full of her own importance that she refused to marry any of her many suitors. But when a hideous leper came, she no longer had any choice.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 3
programme.desc: Several Komians are busy around a large cauldron closely supervised by the High Priestess. Pokou manages to escape with the young boy who had set the trap for the Komian, before saving her.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 16
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 33
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 39
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 40
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1793
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: La Volante
programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: Ma Gueule
programme.desc: 2016, during the European Cup. Stephane returns to La Louviere, his home town, to watch a match with his childhood friends, Luca and Cesare. When Italy wins, they head off to celebrate the victory in a Flemish night club. But there's a problem: Stephane is refused entry.

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 23
programme.desc: In a rusty car just outside Lusagne, Alex finds the prostate but alive body of a young man who'd gone missing years earlier. An emotional return for friends and family. But, very quickly, Alex finds the story the young man gives of his kidnap-ping and years of absence somewhat unlikely.

programme.title: Movie - Jigrathanga Double X
programme.desc: In 1975, Tamil Nadu, an unlikely filmmaker and a dangerous gangster collaborate to make a Western movie.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhala Kaadhala
programme.desc: Ramalingam and Sundaralingam are best friends who always try to earn money the easy way. However, complications arise when they fall in love and try every possible way to impress the girls' families.

programme.title: Movie - Idhu Enga Boomi
programme.desc: Vijay lands in jail while avenging his sister's death. However, when he escapes prison and starts working at Nagalingam's home, he learns that he is planning to steal the villagers' money.

programme.title: Movie - Malarinum Melliya
programme.desc: Pannayar loves his village like his own family and is highly respected in society. When his son falls for the daughter of the local temple priest, his status comes in the way of agreeing to the match.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Billa (Old)
programme.desc: Billa, a powerful outlaw with a long list of enemies, kills Rajesh, a member of his gang, after he quits the criminal life. But Rajesh's fiancee and his sister pledge to take revenge on Billa.

programme.title: Movie - Aayiram Vilakku
programme.desc: When Gopal, a young man, gets adopted by Lingam, an ageing gangster living in Madurai, he goes to any extent to protect Lingam from his enemies and the police.

programme.title: Movie - Jodi
programme.desc: Kannan's father is against love marriage. Kannan loves Gayatri, whose father was once a great music critic. Both decide to win the hearts of each other's family and only marry with their consent.

programme.title: Movie - Soorasamharam
programme.desc: Pandian, a police officer, sets out to take revenge on a drug lord for the murder of his best friend Arun. However, Pandian gets abducted by the criminal and is forced into drug addiction.

programme.title: Movie - Samudhiram
programme.desc: Three brothers would do anything for their only sister. When she is married to the son of a man seeking revenge from their family, the brothers lose all their wealth and are also humiliated by him.

programme.title: Movie - Adithya Varma
programme.desc: Adithya Varma, the wayward son of a businessman, tries to turn over a new leaf after he falls for Meera Shetty. However, caste issues derail their love life and appear to darken Adithya's future.

programme.title: Movie - Naan Chootiya Malar
programme.desc: This movie stars Vijayakanth and Subhadra, and is directed by C S Govindaraja.

programme.title: Movie - Ninaivil Nindraval
programme.desc: A young tourist at a hill station falls in love with her tour guide. When she learns that he was wrongly implicated in a murder case, she tries to help him prove his innocence.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Charlie Chaplin 2
programme.desc: A young man jeopardises his marital life after messaging his wife while under the influence of alcohol. On realising his mistake, he struggles to make amends for it.

programme.title: Movie - 96
programme.desc: K Ramachandran, a photographer, gets nostalgic after he visits his school in his hometown. During a reunion with his classmates, he meets Janaki, his childhood sweetheart.

programme.title: Movie - Aaru
programme.desc: A thug, with his partners, is chosen to work for a criminal gang, and he becomes the left-hand man of the leader. The leader declares a war against another criminal and the thug has to protect him despite losing his friends.

programme.title: Movie - Rambo
programme.desc: Gowtham, a ruthless heir to an education empire and Ram, a kind-hearted orphanage caretaker, are raised with opposing beliefs. When Malar exposes Gowtham's dark secret, the two men face off in a brutal test of power and fists.

programme.title: Movie - Doctor
programme.desc: On the hunt for his fiancee's missing niece Chinnu, military doctor Varun stumbles upon Terry's child abduction and trafficking ring. While in a bid to save Chinnu, her family and Varun end up getting embroiled in Terry's deadly crime web.

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26 - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Venice Qualifier tackle the Venice Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Rumbling Dice, Clear Climb and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Takakeisho, Mitakeumi, Shohozan and Meisei from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Venice Qualifier tackle the Venice Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Rumbling Dice, Clear Climb and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 90
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing the Best Friend Song with their school friends.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 34
programme.desc: Plom is looking after some new furry friends, specifically a heard of Alpacas. But when the Poppacas end up wandering off into the unknown, Plom has to find a way to get them back.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Pug wants to go back in time and our two adventurers visit an inventor who has a time machine. But each time they try to use the machine something goes wrong.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Messy is exploring science questions. He joins his friends in OKIDO on an adventure. They explore the electrical world of circuits to fix Zoe's communicator.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Hey, who turned out the lights? Messy goes to OKIDO and finds out electricity can lead to music, lights and disco dancing!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 28
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 29
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck discover a Lemon Cafe in the park, but it seems to be nearly closing time...

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 3
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato, and the Veggies, who fall into the Deli Counter and come face-to-face with the Turnip of Terror. They escape with help from the not so scary Turnip.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 7
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 8
programme.desc: King Tiger interrupts the Squirrels' quiet time when he turns up to the Clubhouse with a magic hat on instead of his crown.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Valentina shows us how to make a very tasty Greek meal. Her delicious moussaka recipe is loaded with fresh vegetables and topped with green lentils that are packed with goodness.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7) - EP 5
programme.desc: Sandy and Seaweed have invented a new game knocking down bottles with coconuts; they have called it 'Bowling'.

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: He-He and Krash are preparing a special tea party for Lily.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 81
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Dipsy both want a go with Tinky Winky's bag and start to squabble. The Noo-­‐noo sucks up the bag and only gives it back when Tinky Winky and Dipsy are ready to share.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'egg' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of eggs - a dippy egg, a fried egg, a gold egg and Dee and a friend even dress up as eggs.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch head to the Svalbard Global Seed Vault. But, just like when they were cadets together, the two of them get into trouble.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 40
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realize they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the river Nile in search of some African elephants.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: Greener fuel spells trouble for Glitch.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 8
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 5

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: One of the Knights has tried a magic spell but it went wrong and he's shrunk! Queen Sparklewings could help him but she's hiding and won't come out. It's up to Noddy to investigate and work out why the Queen is hiding and how to persuade her to help the Knight grow again.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: There's a mystery in Toyland! All the toys have drawn pictures of Deltoid but they've all been scribbled on and ruined! Noddy opens the investigation to find out who is the mystery artist. Using his wwwbook to follow the clues, Noddy realises that it's Deltoid who was drawing on all the pictures because he didn't think any of them look like him! Noddy suggests that they draw pictures again - and this time Deltoid can draw his own picture too. Clever Noddy's saved the day!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: It's Bling's birthday and she is so excited that she keeps opening all her presents before her party. Noddy needs to make sure she doesn't open the storybook present from him and Big Ears early - but he's got to find it first! Big Ears has hidden it and can't remember where he's put it! Noddy launches his investigation to find the missing present before Bling does. Using his investigating skills Noddy follows the clues all over Toyland to find the present before the impatient little Naughticorn.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Fuse has a new electronic ball. Noddy suggests that they invite everyone to play with it later. Fuse agrees but when Noddy returns with the other toys there is a big brick wall in front of the workshop. No one can get in and there's no sign of Fuse! Noddy uses all his investigating skills to follow the clues. He discovers that Fuse built the brick wall to stop his friends coming into the workshop because he was worried his new electronic ball might get broken.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 31

All the animals had something special; Lion had his mane, Peacock his beautiful tail, Zebra his stripes… but Leopard was as plain as plain can be. Then one day Leopard made friends with Puff Adder with his bright colourful spots. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hyena didn't have short back legs. He was always chasing around and nipping other animals on the bottom. Then one day the animals had enough. It was time to teach that naughty Hyena a lesson! Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 29
programme.desc: When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy is surprised to find it hanging from a lamp post. And when Bumpy's kennel goes missing too, it's clear there's a mischief maker in Toyland. Noddy needs to investigate before Toyland descends into chaos. Using his investigating kit and with Revs and Bumpy to help, Noddy discovers that it was the Naughticorns playing a game of Dare and daring each other to do silly things.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 30
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are each given a balloon at the end of Smartysaurus's Science Party. But when lots of the balloons start going pop, Noddy decides to investigate why. Realising that someone must be hiding and popping them, he follows the clues to PatPat and then to the Naughticorns before eventually working out that the balloon poppers are the Ninjas.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 31
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at the farm - all Farmer Tom's lettuces have been painted pink! Farmer Tom is really upset so Noddy offers to investigate. After talking to PatPat and Smartysaurus he realises that the Ninjas had asked Smartysaurus to make them pink paint so that they could paint the lettuces. They were using them as pom-poms to cheerlead Pink Ninja as she ran the Toyland Marathon Race! The Ninjas are very sorry that they upset Farmer Tom but he tells them that it's alright.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: When some pieces from Big Ears' jigsaw puzzle go missing, Noddy investigates: where are the missing pieces? He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When sea-dwelling dragons called Divewings start attacking ships near the island, the Rescue Riders have to find out what's making them so upset.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it’s up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus’ pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 29
programme.desc: When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy is surprised to find it hanging from a lamp post. And when Bumpy's kennel goes missing too, it's clear there's a mischief maker in Toyland. Noddy needs to investigate before Toyland descends into chaos. Using his investigating kit and with Revs and Bumpy to help, Noddy discovers that it was the Naughticorns playing a game of Dare and daring each other to do silly things.
